articles.author: Suzanne Rowan Kelleher
articles.title: Trump Says Spirit Airlines May Get An ‘America First’ Rescue - Forbes
articles.description: The airline is the first U.S. airline casualty of the jet fuel crisis brought on by the Iran war.
articles.content: President Trump told reporters on Friday he would still like to see the government rescue Spirit, though the airlines creditors reportedly balked at his America First terms, according to a report by … [+4214 chars]
